name: Farmer-Style Sour Cream Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Dairy sour cream, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
Makes 1 loaf
1. Combine water, sugar, and yeast. Stir to dissolve yeast and let stand until bubbly, about 5 minutes.
2. Fit the processor with a steel blade. Measure 2 cups of flour, salt, and baking soda into the work bowl. Process on/off to mix.
3. Add the yeast mixture to the flour mixture. Process until blended, about 10 seconds.
4. Spoon sour cream evenly over the flour mixture. Turn on the processor and add enough of the remaining flour through the feed tube so the dough forms a ball that cleans the sides of the bowl. Process until the ball turns around the bowl about 25 times.
5. Turn the dough onto a lightly floured surface. Shape into a ball and place on a greased cookie sheet. Flatten with hands into a circle about 8 inches in diameter. Brush dough with oil. Sprinkle sesame or poppy seeds over dough, if desired. Let stand in a warm place until doubled, about 1 hour.
6. Heat the oven to 375°F. Bake for 25-30 minutes until golden.
7. Remove from the cookie sheet and cool on a wire rack.
